problems.text: The clock below is an image in the mirror. What is the correct time on it? (Write it in the format 4:30 or 12:10.)
problems.label: Correct time:

problems.text: The pet shop has cats and parrots. Olivia counted 34 legs and 12 tails. How many cats are there in the pet shop?
What number can replace the question mark?
A cat knocked one block off Tore's construction (shown on the left). What could the construction have looked like before the cat knocked the piece off?
How many dots are there altogether from the 1st to the 6th pattern?
A hallway has the dimensions shown in the picture. A cat walks on the dashed line along the middle of the hallway. How many metres does the cat walk?
